title: MikroTik Mounting box CA433U
description: Indoor case (3 holes for Nfemale Bulkhead connectors or Swivel antennas and hole for USB). This new revision is slightly higher, to fit more miniPCI card models. Ships with different faceplate stickers, to match used ports. Fits RB433 series products GPSR Technical support for this product is available on [email protected] email or sending a request via web form . Our technical support is available during this business hours
